function spawnFromRoom(uint256 originRoomId, string metadataURI, string theme, string originEvent, address[] participants, uint8[] roles, bool isPrivate, uint8 roomType, string seedMutation, string tone, bool evolves) external returns (uint256)
function recordInteraction(uint256 roomA, uint256 roomB, string interactionCID) external
function proposeToSwarm(uint256 roomId, string proposal) external returns (uint256)
function voteOnProposal(uint256 proposalId, bool inFavor) external
function getLineageTree(uint256 roomId) external view returns (uint256[])
function getInteractionHistory(uint256 roomA, uint256 roomB) external view returns (string[])
function spawnLinks(uint256) external view returns (uint256 originRoomId, uint256 emergenceRoomId, string seedMutation, uint256 timestamp, address spawner)
event RoomSpawned(uint256 indexed originId, uint256 indexed emergenceId, string seedMutation, address spawner)
event RoomsLinked(uint256 indexed roomA, uint256 indexed roomB, string interactionCID)
event SwarmVote(uint256 indexed proposalId, uint256 indexed roomId, address voter, bool inFavor)
event ConsensusReached(uint256 indexed proposalId, uint256 indexed roomId, bool outcome)
